promotion_decision: Make the native GPU sampler the default for supported PARO c=1 and scheduler-owned serial per-slot c>N sampled requests; keep explicit host fallback for unsupported shapes and HIPENGINE_QWEN35_NATIVE_SAMPLER=0 as rollback.
hardware: AMD Radeon Pro W7900 / gfx1100, HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0

source_benchmark.workload: c1 sampled prompt 45 / decode 64, BF16 KV, one warmup plus three measured runs

default_route_smoke.command: env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_NATIVE_SAMPLER HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'PY' ... LLM.generate_detailed(... SamplingParams(max_tokens=16, temperature=0.7, top_k=4, seed=123, kv_storage='bf16')) ... PY
default_route_smoke.workload: one c1 sampled prompt, 9 prompt tokens, 16 generated tokens
default_route_smoke.performance_note: Elapsed time includes model load/JIT and is route validation only, not a throughput benchmark.

supported: PARO c=1 sampled requests accepted by supports_native_gpu_sampling()
PARO scheduler-owned c>N serial per-slot sampled requests when every row is accepted by supports_native_gpu_sampling() and the resident session exposes native row sampler configuration
fail_closed_to_host: true batched c>N native token selection
combined top_k with top_p or min_p

validation.command: python3 -m pytest tests/test_sampling.py tests/test_server_api.py -q -k 'native_gpu or native_sampler or capabilities_endpoint_reports_manifest_and_auth or sampling'
python3 -m py_compile hipengine/generation/qwen35_paro.py hipengine/server/api.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_server_api.py
uv run ruff check hipengine/generation/qwen35_paro.py hipengine/server/api.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_server_api.py
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 python3 -c "import ctypes; ctypes.CDLL('libamdhip64.so'); print('hip OK')"
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_gpu_sampler_kernel.py -q
